description: A patient data folder at /home/ga/DICOM/mixed_data contains multiple DICOM series, including a low-resolution 'Scout/Localizer' and a high-resolution 'Axial Volumetric' scan. Import the high-resolution volumetric dataset (typically >100 slices, often labeled 'Axial' or 'Volumetric') into InVesalius 3, ensuring the 'Scout' or 'Localizer' series are not used. Create a 3D bone model using the 'Bone' preset and export the surface as a binary STL file to /home/ga/Documents/axial_skull.stl. Login credentials (if needed): username 'ga', password 'password123'.
